name: Flatten a Multilevel Doubly Linked List
description: Given a doubly linked list where some nodes have a child pointer to a separate doubly linked list, flatten all lists into a single-level doubly linked list. Child lists should be inserted between the node and its next.
constraints: The number of nodes is at most 1000. 1 <= Node.val <= 10^5.

performance.target_space: O(d) stack or O(1) iterative splicing
performance.stress_intent: exercise deeply nested child chains that punish repeated tail-search splicing instead of one depth-first flatten traversal
